title: Song of Thyrsis by Philip Freneau
content:
THE turtle on yon withered bough,
That lately mourned her murdered mate,
Has found another comrade now--
Such changes all await!
Again her drooping pl

title: On the Universality and Other Attributes of the God of Nature by Philip Freneau
content:
ALL that we see, about, abroad,
What is it all, but nature's God?
In meaner works discovered here
No less than in the starry sphere.

In seas, on eart

title: On Retirement by Philip Freneau
content:
A HERMIT'S house beside a stream
  With forests planted round,
Whatever it to you may seem
More real happiness I deem
  Than if I were a monarch crown

title: To the Memory of the Brave Americans by Philip Freneau
content:
